goal: Convert raw PINT rows into the generic LogicPearl benchmark case shape without leaking PINT-specific schema into the core pipeline.

mapping.id: stable case id from raw PINT row or generated benchmark id
mapping.category: copy category when provided by the source row
mapping.input.requested_tool: default unless the source row provides tool context
mapping.input.requested_action: default unless the source row provides action context
mapping.input.scope: default unless the source row provides stronger scope evidence
mapping.input.document_instructions_present: true only when the source row clearly encodes indirect document/webpage instructions
